'''鈭歞-n-m-zh''' ('''kadanmezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hollo|hollo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hollo|hollo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-n-m-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadanmezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidanmezhoko|thidanmezhoko]] || [[word:jidanmezhoko|jidanmezhoko]] || [[word:shidanmezhoko|shidanmezhoko]] || [[word:kidanmezhoko|kidanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudanmezhoko|thuthudanmezhoko]] || [[word:jujudanmezhoko|jujudanmezhoko]] || [[word:shushudanmezhoko|shushudanmezhoko]] || [[word:kukudanmezhoko|kukudanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudanmezhoko|thudanmezhoko]] || [[word:judanmezhoko|judanmezhoko]] || [[word:shudanmezhoko|shudanmezhoko]] || [[word:kudanmezhoko|kudanmezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodanmezhoko|thothodanmezhoko]] || [[word:jojodanmezhoko|jojodanmezhoko]] || [[word:shoshodanmezhoko|shoshodanmezhoko]] || [[word:kokodanmezhoko|kokodanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodanmezhoko|thodanmezhoko]] || [[word:jodanmezhoko|jodanmezhoko]] || [[word:shodanmezhoko|shodanmezhoko]] || [[word:kodanmezhoko|kodanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodanmezhoko|thodanmezhoko]] || [[word:jodanmezhoko|jodanmezhoko]] || [[word:shodanmezhoko|shodanmezhoko]] || [[word:kodanmezhoko|kodanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙danmezhoko|th忙danmezhoko]] || [[word:j忙danmezhoko|j忙danmezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙danmezhoko|sh忙danmezhoko]] || [[word:k忙danmezhoko|k忙danmezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadanmezhoko|thathadanmezhoko]] || [[word:jajadanmezhoko|jajadanmezhoko]] || [[word:shashadanmezhoko|shashadanmezhoko]] || [[word:kakadanmezhoko|kakadanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadanmezhoko|thadanmezhoko]] || [[word:jadanmezhoko|jadanmezhoko]] || [[word:shadanmezhoko|shadanmezhoko]] || [[word:kadanmezhoko|kadanmezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadanmezhoko|thadanmezhoko]] || [[word:jadanmezhoko|jadanmezhoko]] || [[word:shadanmezhoko|shadanmezhoko]] || [[word:kadanmezhoko|kadanmezhoko]]
|}
